overview: SecureVote is a next-generation online voting platform with role-based access, dynamic ballot creation, real-time results, and a stunning glassmorphism UI powered by Framer Motion animations.
features: Role-based login via Internet Identity (Voter / Admin)
Admin election creation with Multiple Choice and Yes/No questions
Scheduled elections with automatic open/close by time
Voter ballot interface with real-time validation and anonymous confirmation token
Live turnout dashboard with animated bar and pie charts
Glassmorphism dark-theme UI — backdrop blur cards, subtle gradients
Framer Motion: page transitions, marquee status bar, staggered reveals, micro-interactions
Custom percentage-based loading screen on first entry
